original: This skull-faced helm completely obscures the wearer’s face under a veil of fire-blackened bone. The empty sockets house eerily dancing blue flames against a backdrop of impenetrable coal, yet by some clever polarization of the light, none of it serves to obscure the wearer’s view.
context: <<POS:05360130>> n="a helm of terror",e.tooltip='This skull-faced helm completely obscures the wearer’s face '
